summary: Staff Login System testing completed for Little Eat Italy. All 22 backend API tests passed. Frontend UI shows PIN login screen at /personal with working PIN entry, login, and staff dashboard with orders/reservations management. Admin can configure staff PIN in shop settings (EINSTELLUNGEN tab).
passed_tests: API: POST /api/staff/login with correct PIN (1234) returns token with 12h expiry (200 OK)
API: POST /api/staff/login with wrong PIN returns 401 error
API: POST /api/staff/login with empty PIN returns 401 error
API: POST /api/staff/login with short PIN returns 401 error
API: GET /api/staff/verify with valid staff token returns role='staff' (200 OK)
API: GET /api/staff/verify without token returns 403
API: GET /api/staff/verify with invalid token returns 401
API: GET /api/staff/orders with staff token returns orders list (200 OK)
API: GET /api/staff/orders without token returns 403
API: GET /api/staff/orders with status filter works (200 OK)
API: GET /api/staff/orders with admin token also works (200 OK)
API: PUT /api/staff/orders/{id}/status updates order status to confirmed (200 OK)
API: PUT /api/staff/orders/{id}/status with invalid status returns 400
API: PUT /api/staff/orders/{id}/status for nonexistent order returns 404
API: GET /api/staff/reservations with staff token returns reservations list (200 OK)
API: GET /api/staff/reservations without token returns 403
API: GET /api/staff/reservations with status filter works (200 OK)
API: PUT /api/staff/reservations/{id}/status updates reservation status (200 OK)
API: PUT /api/staff/reservations/{id}/status with invalid status returns 400
API: PUT /api/staff/reservations/{id}/status for nonexistent reservation returns 404
API: GET /api/shop/settings includes staff_pin field (200 OK)
API: PUT /api/shop/settings can update staff_pin (admin only) (200 OK)
UI: /personal page shows PIN login screen with chef icon
UI: PIN entry shows 4 boxes that fill with dots when digits entered
UI: Number pad with 0-9 digits and delete button works
UI: Correct PIN (1234) logs in and shows staff dashboard
UI: Wrong PIN shows 'Falscher PIN' error message
UI: Staff dashboard shows LIVE indicator
UI: Staff dashboard shows stats bar with order/reservation counts
UI: BESTELLUNGEN (orders) tab shows order list
UI: RESERVIERUNGEN (reservations) tab available
UI: No navbar/footer shown on /personal page
Admin: PIN can be configured in admin settings (/admin/shop -> EINSTELLUNGEN)
critical_code_review_comments: Staff PIN stored in shop_settings collection with default value '1234'
Staff tokens use JWT with 12-hour expiry (43200 seconds)
Staff tokens have role='staff' vs admin tokens which have username as sub
Staff endpoints accept both staff and admin tokens for flexibility
PIN login clears on wrong attempt with error message
Staff page uses polling (4 seconds) for real-time updates
Sound and push notification toggles available on staff dashboard
seed_data_creation: Created TEST_Staff_Pizza orders and TEST_Staff_Reservation during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Staff Login System fully tested. Features verified: 1) POST /api/staff/login with PIN returns JWT token 2) GET /api/staff/verify returns role 3) GET/PUT staff orders and reservations endpoints 4) Staff PIN configurable in admin settings 5) /personal page with PIN login UI 6) Staff dashboard with orders/reservations tabs. Default staff PIN is '1234'. Staff tokens have 12h expiry. Admin can also access staff endpoints.

staff_features_verified.login_endpoint: POST /api/staff/login accepts PIN and returns JWT token
staff_features_verified.orders_endpoint: GET /api/staff/orders returns orders list (supports status filter)
staff_features_verified.order_update: PUT /api/staff/orders/{id}/status updates status with prep_time support for ASAP orders
staff_features_verified.reservations_endpoint: GET /api/staff/reservations returns reservations list (supports status/date filters)
staff_features_verified.pin_settings: staff_pin field in shop_settings, configurable in admin EINSTELLUNGEN tab
staff_features_verified.frontend_login: /personal shows PIN login with numpad, 4-digit entry, error handling
staff_features_verified.frontend_dashboard: Staff dashboard with LIVE indicator, stats, orders/reservations tabs
staff_features_verified.no_nav_footer: Navbar and footer hidden on /personal page
